posts.text:
“We’re fighting the regime — not the Iranian people.”

@VDHanson says the U.S. is deliberately limiting targets to avoid harming civilians.

“We could do far more damage much faster. But we’re trying to demilitarize the regime without making life insufferable for the people we ultimately want to liberate.”

Video

“This is a DOUBLE betrayal of Iran’s revolution.”

Chuck DeVore says the supreme leader’s succession undermines the very principles the 1979 revolution claimed to defend.

“He’s not a grand ayatollah, just a mid-level cleric — and now you have a dynastic succession. The revolution was supposed to end that.”

Video

posts.text:
Murkowski’s never moved faster in her life than when she’s trying to avoid answering real questions.


Brandon Gill (@realBrandonGill)

Lisa Murkowski was a major advocate for ranked choice voting in Alaska.

Without changing Alaska’s election rules, she’d never have been re-elected.

Of course, she’s also against the SAVE America Act.



— https://nitter.net/realBrandonGill/status/2031828894551028028#m

posts.text: What McConnell & Co. figured out long ago is that with the “silent” filibuster, the Senate rarely has to vote on anything.  Senators can just grandstand to party extremes, yet never be held accountable for any legislation.
posts.quote: What McConnell & Co. figured out long ago is that with the “silent” filibuster, the Senate rarely has to vote on anything.  Senators can just grandstand to party extremes, yet never be held accountable for any legislation.

posts.text: Seems pretty obvious Thune doesn’t think he can keep control of the floor if there is a “talking” filibuster.  (Things that GOP doesn’t want passed may pass.)
posts.quote: Seems pretty obvious Thune doesn’t think he can keep control of the floor if there is a “talking” filibuster.  (Things that GOP doesn’t want passed may pass.)

posts.text:
“The Left’s RADICAL training camp.”

James Gagliano warns activist groups are teaching people how to undermine the justice system from inside the jury box.

“They’re training potential jurors to say they’re impartial — when they’re not — and to refuse cooperation with the justice system.”

Video

posts.text:
“Only AMERICAN citizens should vote.”

Sen. @berniemoreno says voter ID and proof of citizenship are simply common sense.

“We’re talking about a very low threshold — identify who you are and prove you’re a U.S. citizen when you register to vote. I think we’re getting closer to having people realize how important it is for us to deliver on a fundamental promise, which is to secure our elections for the future.”

Video
